K4Analytics_Description: Enterprise planning and budgeting powered by K4 Analytics
K4Analytics_CreateDesc: Create a K4 Analytics planning model
K4Analytics_DetailDesc: K4 Analytics brings enterprise-grade FP&A and S&OP planning directly into Microsoft Fabric. Connect your K4 planning models and collaborate with your team in a single workspace.
K4Analytics_GetStarted_Intro: Connect your K4 planning models to Fabric
K4Analytics_GetStarted_Desc: Learn how to set up your K4 server connection and start working with planning models inside Microsoft Fabric.
K4Model_Description: Connect and embed a K4 Analytics planning model in this Fabric workspace
K4_Empty_Description: Configure your K4 server connection to embed a planning model in this Fabric workspace.
K4_Empty_Connect_Desc: Enter your K4 server URL and model ID to get started.
K4_EntraId_On: Enabled — users authenticate via Microsoft Entra ID
K4_Settings_Description: Update your K4 server connection for this item.
